title: Vanity Fair
subtitle: A glittering world that prices the soul cheaply
intro: After darkness, the fair arrives like relief: color, music, laughter, and a thousand stalls promising an easier self.
It sells honor without holiness, pleasure without peace, and a reputation polished enough to hide an unrepentant heart.
Refusal will make you strange here. Refuse anyway, and watch for the friend whose hope is born in the middle of the crowd.
spiritual_theme: Discernment, costly witness, and finding fellowship in a hostile fair
core_mechanic: Refuse the fair's wares, expose their false shine, meet Hopeful, and leave by the far gate without selling peace for applause.
